creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 181233
Patch to update textproc/libxml++26 to 2.40.1

textproc/libxml++26: Update to 2.40.1

- This is the most current release which does not introduce API breakage
- Add LICENSE and LICENSE_FILE details

Changes this release:
  2.40.1:  https://mail.gnome.org/archives/libxmlplusplus-list/2015-October/msg00002.html
  2.38:    https://mail.gnome.org/archives/libxmlplusplus-list/2015-February/msg00000.html
  <= 2.36: https://git.gnome.org/browse/libxml++/tree/ChangeLog.pre-2-36-0
